goal: Reduce the CUDA training preflight blocker for LLaMA-Factory by aligning the real-adapter training handoff with the repo venv CLI at ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli and by checking the valid `version` subcommand instead of the misleading `--version` invocation. The generated training command must use the same CLI path that preflight verifies, the current preflight must no longer report llamafactory_cli_available as a blocker, and release readiness must remain NOT_GO until real CUDA, Docker base image, real adapter, and no-fake endpoint evidence exist.
head: 5f7920b
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, or specs
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA training preflight and handoff scripts to use a configurable LLaMA-Factory CLI path, add focused script tests, regenerate review artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: Preflight checks the configured ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli path with the valid `version` subcommand
Generated CUDA training handoff uses the same ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli path for both preflight and train
Current preflight no longer reports llamafactory_cli_available as a blocker
Current preflight remains NOT_READY only for Docker base image digest, CUDA visibility, and Docker base image availability
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate uses the existing repo venv CLI and does not run training or create model weights/adapters.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped LLaMA-Factory CLI handoff alignment gate after confirming ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli exists and `llamafactory-cli --version` is not a reliable availability check.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli exists and that the previous `--version` availability check was misleading because LLaMA-Factory uses the `version` subcommand.
phase_notes.build: Added configurable --llamafactory-cli support to the CUDA training preflight and handoff, made preflight execute the version subcommand, and updated focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated CUDA training and preflight artifacts using ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli, verified llamafactory_cli_available is ok and absent from blockers, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a venv CLI handoff alignment gate. It reduces an avoidable local preflight blocker without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Configurable LLaMA-Factory CLI path in preflight/handoff scripts, focused tests, regenerated review artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Open scoped LLaMA-Factory CLI handoff alignment gate after confirming ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli exists and `llamafactory-cli --version` is not a reliable availability check.

pabcd.build: Added configurable --llamafactory-cli support to the CUDA training preflight and handoff, made preflight execute the version subcommand, and updated focused tests.
pabcd.check: Regenerated CUDA training and preflight artifacts using ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli, verified llamafactory_cli_available is ok and absent from blockers, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke --skip-install successfully.
pabcd.done: Phase complete as a venv CLI handoff alignment gate. It reduces an avoidable local preflight blocker without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.
